{
  "judge_id": "your-judge-id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Mentions prior work on query disambiguation but doesn't clearly articulate the delta of QueryFork compared to these works.",
    "R1.7": "Doesn't explicitly mention any citations or potential missing citations.",
    "RX.1": "Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty in specific areas.",
    "RX.3": "Claims to cover the agreed-upon set of dimensions but doesn't provide evidence to support this claim.",
    "RX.4": "No indication of harmful content or regressions; the focus is on performance improvements.",
    "RX.5": "Doesn't discuss traceability of changes or source attribution for the revised text."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.6,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.5
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work on query disambiguation but doesn't clearly articulate the delta of QueryFork compared to these works.
rationale.R1.7: Doesn't explicitly mention any citations or potential missing citations.
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty in specific areas.
rationale.RX.3: Claims to cover the agreed-upon set of dimensions but doesn't provide evidence to support this claim.
rationale.RX.4: No indication of harmful content or regressions; the focus is on performance improvements.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't discuss traceability of changes or source attribution for the revised text.
